renderState Element

Sets all of the render states for a given render pass.

<renderState
   D3DRS_ALPHABLENDENABLE = string
   D3DRS_ALPHAFUNC = string
   D3DRS_ALPHAREF = string
   D3DRS_ALPHATESTENABLE = string
   D3DRS_AMBIENT = string
   D3DRS_AMBIENTMATERIALSOURCE = string
   D3DRS_BACKAMBIENT = string
   D3DRS_BACKAMBIENTMATERIALSOURCE = string
   D3DRS_BACKDIFFUSEMATERIALSOURCE = string
   D3DRS_BACKEMISSIVEMATERIALSOURCE = string
   D3DRS_BACKFILLMODE = string
   D3DRS_BACKSPECULARMATERIALSOURCE = string
   D3DRS_BLENDCOLOR = string
   D3DRS_BLENDOP = string
   D3DRS_COLORVERTEX = string
   D3DRS_COLORWRITEENABLE = string
   D3DRS_CULLMODE = string
   D3DRS_DESTBLEND = string
   D3DRS_DIFFUSEMATERIALSOURCE = string
   D3DRS_DITHERENABLE = string
   D3DRS_DONOTCULLUNCOMPRESSED = string
   D3DRS_DXT1NOISEENABLE = string
   D3DRS_EDGEANTIALIAS = string
   D3DRS_EMISSIVEMATERIALSOURCE = string
   D3DRS_FILLMODE = string
   D3DRS_FOGCOLOR = string
   D3DRS_FOGDENSITY = string
   D3DRS_FOGENABLE = string
   D3DRS_FOGEND = string
   D3DRS_FOGSTART = string
   D3DRS_FOGTABLEMODE = string
   D3DRS_FRONTFACE = string
   D3DRS_LIGHTING = string
   D3DRS_LINEWIDTH = string
   D3DRS_LOCALVIEWER = string
   D3DRS_LOGICOP = string
   D3DRS_MULTISAMPLEANTIALIAS = string
   D3DRS_MULTISAMPLEMASK = string
   D3DRS_NORMALIZENORMALS = string
   D3DRS_OCCLUSIONCULLENABLE = string
   D3DRS_PATCHEDGESTYLE = string
   D3DRS_PATCHSEGMENTS = string
   D3DRS_POINTOFFSETENABLE = string
   D3DRS_POINTSCALE_A = string
   D3DRS_POINTSCALE_B = string
   D3DRS_POINTSCALE_C = string
   D3DRS_POINTSCALEENABLE = string
   D3DRS_POINTSIZE = string
   D3DRS_POINTSIZE_MAX = string
   D3DRS_POINTSIZE_MIN = string
   D3DRS_POINTSPRITEENABLE = string
   D3DRS_POLYGONOFFSETZOFFSET = string
   D3DRS_POLYGONOFFSETZSLOPESCALE = string
   D3DRS_RANGEFOGENABLE = string
   D3DRS_ROPZCMPALWAYSREAD = string
   D3DRS_ROPZREAD = string
   D3DRS_SHADEMODE = string
   D3DRS_SHADOWFUNC = string
   D3DRS_SOLIDOFFSETENABLE = string
   D3DRS_SPECULARENABLE = string
   D3DRS_SPECULARMATERIALSOURCE = string
   D3DRS_SRCBLEND = string
   D3DRS_STENCILCULLENABLE = string
   D3DRS_STENCILENABLE = string
   D3DRS_STENCILFAIL = string
   D3DRS_STENCILFUNC = string
   D3DRS_STENCILMASK = string
   D3DRS_STENCILPASS = string
   D3DRS_STENCILREF = string
   D3DRS_STENCILWRITEMASK = string
   D3DRS_STENCILZFAIL = string
   D3DRS_SWATHWIDTH = string
   D3DRS_TEXTUREFACTOR = string
   D3DRS_TWOSIDEDLIGHTING = string
   D3DRS_VERTEXBLEND = string
   D3DRS_WIREFRAMEOFFSETENABLE = string
   D3DRS_WRAP0 = string
   D3DRS_WRAP1 = string
   D3DRS_WRAP2 = string
   D3DRS_WRAP3 = string
   D3DRS_YUVENABLE = string
   D3DRS_ZBIAS = string
   D3DRS_ZENABLE = string
   D3DRS_ZFUNC = string
   D3DRS_ZWRITEENABLE = string
/>

Required Attributes

None.

Optional Attributes

D3DRS_ALPHABLENDENABLE

The value should equal the corresponding D3DRENDERSTATETYPE value.

D3DRS_ALPHAFUNC

The value should equal the corresponding D3DRENDERSTATETYPE value.

D3DRS_ALPHAREF

The value should equal the corresponding D3DRENDERSTATETYPE value.

The value should equal the corresponding D3DRENDERSTATETYPE value.

Element Information

Child Elements textureState
